"[15] 1039 INVLD PTY - OCCD MARKHAM X CARROL - CHP OFFICER HIGH SPEEDS THROUGH PLOT - CAUSED RP TO SUDDENLY BRK AND GO DOWN ON ELECTRIC BIKE - RP ADV IF HE DIDN'T STOP OFFICER WOULD HAVE HIT HIM // CHP OFFICER TOLD RP THAT HE HAD TO GO TO A EMERG CALL - ASKED IF HE WAS OKAY AND OFFERED TO BUY HIM NEW SWEATPANTS BUT LEFT"
"[12] RP ADV CHP OFFICER NEAR TC W/ SON"
"[3] RP SON WAS ON ELECTRIC BIKE AND OFFICER "SPED" OUT OF PLOT FOR RED MART PLOT AND NEAR TC W/ SON - CAUSED HIM TO GO DOWN"

"[4] RP OPENED DOOR , VEH 1124 , UNK WHO BELONGS TO "

Log.Location: "Mt Baldy Rd / Ice House Canyon Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[9] 1039 CORDS - ADV HAS HAD MULT PLOWS GOING THRU THE AREA 24/7 - HAS A REQUEST IN FOR A CINDER RUN - NOT STARTING CHAIN CONTROL AT THIS TIME [Shared]"
"[8] 123-201 INQ W/CORDS IF CHAIN CONTROL WILL BE NEEDED AND IF WILL NEED TO BE MANNED [Shared]"

details.IncidentDetail: "[1] OAK CREEK RD CLOSED FROM TEHACHAPI WILLOW SPRINGS RD TO CEMENT PLANT RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"

"[1] GARLOCK RD - CLOSED FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE"
